templatesPage.title: Templates
templatesPage.subtitle: Contract and document generation
templatesPage.lineItemsHint: Add billable services and products. Totals update in the preview.
templatesPage.emptyLinesHint: Add your first service or product to build the contract pricing.
templatesPage.termsHint: Dates, payment conditions, tax, and recurring billing for this contract.
templatesPage.vatHint: Uses each line’s VAT % from Services / Products above. No separate contract rate.
templatesPage.recurringHint: Bill the client on a fixed schedule after the contract is signed.
templatesPage.recurringServicesHint: Services billed on each cycle (hosting, support, subscriptions, etc.).
templatesPage.recurringVatHint: When enabled, VAT % is applied per item and shown in the recurring payments table.
templatesPage.noticePeriodHint: Minimum written notice required by either party to terminate the ongoing agreement.
templatesPage.noticePeriodHintOnetime: Notice the client must give if they cancel before work begins. After work starts, pro-rata charges apply.
templatesPage.showPricesHint: When enabled, the pricing table shows quantities and amounts. When disabled, only service/product names are listed.
templatesPage.employmentTermsHint: Employee identity, employment conditions, duties, compensation, leave, and termination terms.
templatesPage.employeeDutiesHint: Describe the employee's responsibilities. This text is inserted into the contract body.
templatesPage.employerDutiesHint: Describe the employer's obligations. This text is inserted into the contract body.
templatesPage.annualLeaveHint: Annual leave, sick leave, and other leave entitlements. Inserted into the contract body.
templatesPage.partnerTermsHint: Partner identity, role, commission, obligations, brand usage, and termination terms.
templatesPage.partnerCommissionTermsHint: Detailed commission calculation and payment rules inserted into the contract.
templatesPage.partnerObligationsHint: Describe the partner's responsibilities. Inserted into the contract body.
templatesPage.itarenaObligationsHint: Describe IT Arena's responsibilities. Inserted into the contract body.
templatesPage.brandUsageHint: Logo, marketing materials, and brand guidelines for the partner.
templatesPage.partyIdHint: Used in contract when NIPT is empty
templatesPage.savedTemplatesHint: Each saved template includes full contract text in both Albanian and English.

projectsPage.inviteNoEmail: Invite email not sent — temporary password
projectsPage.noStepsHint: Break the project into milestones and track progress for your team and clients.

site.titleDefault: IT Arena — Technology Solutions for Your Business

quotePage.heroSubtitle: Tell us what you need and our team will send you a personalized quote within 24 hours.
quotePage.benefit1Desc: Our team analyzes the requirements and sends a detailed quote within the day.
quotePage.benefit2Desc: Your business data is handled with ISO 27001 standards.
quotePage.benefit3Desc: The quote is free and with no obligation. Decide freely.
quotePage.benefit4Desc: Every project comes with a support plan and guaranteed SLA.
quotePage.formSubtitlePrefilled: Your details are filled from your account. Complete the project details.
quotePage.formSubtitleGuest: The more details you provide, the more accurate our quote will be.
